news.title:
Motilal Oswal raises MTAR Technologies' target to ₹6,000 citing growth.
Upgrades FY27/28 revenue estimates by 16%/33%; bullish on long-term outlook.
news.summary:

news.title:
Defence stocks surged up to 10% amid US-Iran ceasefire hopes, led by MTAR Technologies.
Nifty India Defence index rose 2.5%; BEL, BDL, HAL, and Mazagon Dock among top gainers.
news.summary:
Defence stocks surged up to 10% amid US-Iran ceasefire hopes, led by MTAR Technologies.

news.title:
MTAR Tech shares surged 5.2%, driven by Bloom Energy's 2.8 GW Oracle deal.
MTAR forecasts FY27 revenue growth of 50% & FY26 order book of ₹2,800 crore.
news.summary:
MTAR Tech shares surged 5.2%, driven by Bloom Energy's 2.8 GW Oracle deal.
MTAR forecasts FY27 revenue growth of 50% & FY26 order book of ₹2,800 crore.

news.title:
MTAR Tech completed 70% of prototype core for fast breeder reactor after 10-15 years of R&D.
Each Stage 3 thorium reactor order could bring Rs.1500 crore revenue to MTAR Tech.
news.summary:
MTAR Tech completed 70% of prototype core for fast breeder reactor after 10-15 years of R&D.
Each Stage 3 thorium reactor order could bring Rs.1500 crore revenue to MTAR Tech.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies targets 50% revenue growth by FY27, driven by strong Q4 order flows.
70% of MTAR Technologies' revenue is attributed to exports, per Srinivas Reddy.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies reports 70% of its revenue originates from exports.
This emphasizes the company's strong focus on international sales.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies supplied 70% of India's Fast Breeder Reactor core materials.
This highlights MTAR's role in a significant strategic nuclear program.

news.title:

The company reaffirms 50% revenue growth guidance for FY27.

news.title:
Experts discussed buy, sell, or hold recommendations for stocks like IOC, IndiGo, GE Shipping, Gail, and more on NDTV Profit.
IOC and Gail were advised as long-term holds; IndiGo faced resistance near Rs 4,900-5,000, and MTAR as 'wait and watch.'
news.summary:
Experts discussed buy, sell, or hold recommendations for stocks like IOC, IndiGo, GE Shipping, Gail, and more on NDTV Profit.
IOC and Gail were advised as long-term holds; IndiGo faced resistance near Rs 4,900-5,000, and MTAR as 'wait and watch.'

news.title:
MTAR Technologies Ltd secures Rs. 35.6 Cr order for energy sector data center projects.
Order from an international entity to be executed by Dec 2026; additional orders expected.
news.summary:

news.title:
Defence stocks like Mazagon Dock, MTAR Tech dropped up to 11% despite Iran-Israel war.
War's third week showed counterintuitive trends, failing to boost defence sector stocks.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like Mazagon Dock, MTAR Tech dropped up to 11% despite Iran-Israel war.

news.title:
MTAR Technologies benefits from India's plan to build 20 nuclear reactors, securing significant orders and projecting Rs. 5,250 crore revenue from nuclear projects.
MTAR posted record Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs. 278 crore, with clean energy and aerospace segments showing strong growth bolstered by capacity expansions.
news.summary:
MTAR Technologies benefits from India's plan to build 20 nuclear reactors, securing significant orders and projecting Rs. 5,250 crore revenue from nuclear projects.
MTAR posted record Q3 FY26 revenue of Rs. 278 crore, with clean energy and aerospace segments showing strong growth bolstered by capacity expansions.

The company plans to cut working capital days to below 200.

news.title:
Leelavathi Parvatha Reddy, promoter of MTAR Technologies Ltd, acquired 2.97 lakh shares via inter-se transfer as a gift.
The transfer involved 2 lakh shares from P. Srinivas Reddy and 97,000 shares from Saranya Loka Reddy, both promoters.
news.summary:
Leelavathi Parvatha Reddy, promoter of MTAR Technologies Ltd, acquired 2.97 lakh shares via inter-se transfer as a gift.
